title: Waystones Plus
description: This project reworks Waystones UI to make it more user friendly
body:
**Waystones UI+** is a client-side quality-of-life addon for **NeoForge 1.21.1** that improves the Waystones teleport selection screen and makes large waystone networks much easier to use.

The default Waystones interface can become inconvenient when you have many discovered waystones. This mod replaces that limited browsing experience with a more practical scroll-based UI and adds personal organization tools that are visible only to you.

Features

* Custom scroll UI for browsing waystones more comfortably
* Personal renaming of waystones for your client only
* Private notes for remembering what each waystone is actually for
* Sorting options
    * by name
    * by distance
* Favorites
* Custom favorites order for quick access to your most important destinations

Why use it?

If you play on multiplayer servers, you probably know the problem:
other players often name waystones in ways that make sense to them, but not necessarily to you.

With this mod, you can organize everything locally:
rename waystones for yourself, leave notes, and keep your favorite destinations exactly where you want them.

Client-side only

This mod is designed as a client-side addon.

That means:

* your personal renames are only visible to you
* your notes are only visible to you
* it does not rename waystones on the server
* it does not affect other players
* it does not change teleport mechanics

It only improves the interface and your personal waystone organization.

Planned Features

* Folders for better waystone organization
* Level cost display
